_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Establish cyber career paths to allow career progression, deliberate development, and growth within and between cyber career fields.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including talent acquisition, onboarding design, performance management, career development planning, and succession preparation.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-009 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-S-001 (DG, cosine: 0.409), OP-S-010 (OP, cosine: 0.407).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 4.8/10 (raw 0.483). Shared vocabulary: [career, development]. DCWF-only terms [allow, cyber, deliberate, establish, fields, growth] vs WIDAI-only terms [acquisition, ai, building, data, design, developing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.874 (P=0.881, R=0.867). Balanced P/R — the 18-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: mixed signal (E:35.8%, N:64.0%, C:0.1%). No dominant classification for "Establish cyber career paths to allow career progression, deliberate development" vs "Skill in building and developing high-performing data and AI teams, including ta" — the relationship is genuinely ambiguous from a logical inference perspective.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.433 < STS 0.483 (gap -0.050). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [allow, cyber, deliberate] and [acquisition, ai, building] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.1%. Shared tokens: [career, development]. DCWF-only: [allow, cyber, deliberate, establish, fields, growth]. WIDAI-only: [acquisition, ai, building, data, design, developing].
